upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prARAya tveti prAcImupalAM prohati' (Apa॰Saru॰1.6.21.6) prohati prApayatItyarTAntaram
'vAjasya mA prasavena prohAmi' (vA॰saM॰2.15) vAjasya puroqASAderaByanujYayA''tmAnaM prerayAmItyarTaH
atra mahIDara itTamAha— yadyapyUhatirvitarkArTastaTA'pyupasargavaSAdutsAhArTaH
'kfzRAjine prohati (pizwAni)' (kA॰SrO॰2.5.7) prohati prakzipatItyarTaH
'yena pUzA bfhaspateriti triH prAYcaM prohati' (go॰gf॰2.9.16) prohati savitarkaM paSyatIti satyavrataH prohati prerayati kzuramiti tu mukundaSarmA
'yadaDo'Do'kzaM droRakalaSaM prohanti' (jE0 brA0 177) prohanti prerayanti prApayanti
'idamahamAtmAnameva prAYcaM prohAmi tejase brahmavarcasAya' (ni0 1155 durgavfttO) ukto'rTaH
'apApa SakrastatanuzwimUhati' (f॰5.34.3) atrApaSabdasya nipAtasya dviruktiH dvitIyopaSabda Amreqitam sa ca sarvAnudAttaH apohati=dUraM karoti

'vAjasyEnaM prasavenApohAmi' (vA॰saM॰2.15)

'iti manasi yaH kAvyAramBe kaverBavati SramaH sanayanajalo romodBedastamapohati' (pAda॰Slo॰3).. ukto'rTaH
'apEtadUha yadihAbiBaH purA' (aTarva॰18.2.57) apoha=parityaja=parihara=jahAhi
'sa hi viGnAnapohati' (SA॰3.2) apAkarotItyAha
'kusumAni…praBavantyAyurapohituM yadi' (raGu॰8.44) apohitum=kzapayitum

akiYcidapi kurvARaH sOKyErduHKAnyapohati' (uttara॰2.29) apohati=apAkaroti
'sarvAn rasAnapoheta kftAnnaM tu tilEH saha' (manu॰10.86) apoheta=tyajet vikraye varjayedityarTaH
'kiM vyAptaM kimapohitam' (pra॰ca॰) apohitam=vyAvartitam
'AraRyEH sTaRqilaM pratApyApohyANgArAn' (go॰gf॰4.8.12) apohya=apanIya=dUrIkftya
'ime manuzyA dfSyante UhApohaviSAradAH' (BA॰anu॰145.43) apohaH=pUrvapakzo'paratarkanirAsAya kfto viparItastarka iti ca UhaH sidDAnta iti nIlakaRWaH
'paYcavawyAM tato rAmaH… anapoQasTitiH tasTO' (raGu॰12.31) aparityaktamaryAda ityAha arTAnvayavaSAdapoQamiti UhaternizWAyAM rUpamiti SakyamAsTAtum iqaBAvastu duHsamADAnaH
'fdDimantamaDikardDiruttaraH pUrvamutsavamapOhadutsavaH' (raGu0 195) apOhat=apAnudat pratyAdiSadityarTaH
'yadgavyantA dvA janA svaryantA samUhasi' (f॰1.131.3) yatastapaH sasUhasi uBayatra samAnayasi saNgamayasItyarTaH tapaH samUhasIti tapaH saMhataM karozIti varIyo vyAKyAnam
